layout.delivery: Delivery across Cyprus in under 24 hours.

about.title: Your reliable partner for travel-ready classic games
about.description: We design and curate compact versions of timeless games made for life on the move. Our collections combine portability, durability, and classic design — so you can play anywhere your journey takes you.

design.title: Travel-Ready Design
design.description: Our games are compact, Lighter than your smartphone, and easy to pack — perfect for road trips, flights, and weekend escapes.

craftsmanship.title: Timeless Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: We focus on durable materials and classic aesthetics that feel just as good at home as they do abroad.

connection.title: Made for Connection
connection.description: From quiet chess matches to lively domino nights, our games bring people together wherever you are.

home.title: Portable classic games for every adventure.
home.description: The best sale is a profitable sale that brings health and tranquility to the community.
home.falling: Our collection from the world of play and joy

home.title: Home
home.description: Enjoy classic board games in the comfort of your home. Gather family or friends and spend quality time playing timeless games like chess, domino, or tic-tac-toe.
home.keywords: Family games, Group fun, Relaxing, Classic board games, Social time

beach.title: Beach
beach.description: The Beach Collection Relaxation, portability, and fun in the sun! Why just lounge when you can play? Our travel board games are designed for the modern explorer — ultra-portable and easy to pack, they fit perfectly in your beach bag alongside your towel and sunscreen. Whether you’re under an umbrella or soaking up the sun, bring your travel games to the beach and enjoy fun moments with family and friends, turning your beach day into a mini championship
beach.keywords: Light & fun, Outdoor-friendly, Compact, Quick games, Sun & sand play

airport.title: Air Port
airport.description: The Airport Lounge Collection, Flight delayed? Long layover? Put the phones away and make memories instead. Our travel games are the ultimate airport companions — small enough to play on a tray table and light enough to slip into your carry-on without a second thought. From the departure gate to 30,000 feet, keep the excitement alive with games that go wherever you do. Waiting for a flight has never been more enjoyable — play with friends, family, or fellow travelers and make your journey start even before takeoff.
airport.keywords: Easy to carry, Travel-friendly, Quick rounds,Lightweight,Pass time

cafe.title: Cafe
cafe.description: The Café Collection, Casual Play, Social Connection, and Coffee Break Fun. Turn Coffee Time into Game Time. Relax at a café while enjoying a friendly game. Our travel board games are perfect for playing over coffee with friends or meeting new people. Compact and lightweight, they fit easily on small tables, making your coffee break more engaging and memorable. Whether it’s a quick match between sips or a longer session with friends, our games turn every café visit into a social, fun, and memorable experience.
cafe.keywords: Casual play, Social & friendly, Small table games,Coffee break fun

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.description: Each of our games includes the high-quality cotton bag with printed  playing field – a well thought-out 2-in-1 concept that cleverly combines gaming fun and storage.
warranty.duration: We stand up for the quality of our products. That’s why we grant a generous <tag>2-year</tag> warranty on each cotton bag.
warranty.note: <tag>Note:</tag> The warranty refers to the cotton bag with the playing field. The return of the original bag is required for the  use of the warranty.

free_exchange.title: Free Exchange
free_exchange.description: In the case of material or manufacturing defects, we will gladly replace your product free of charge — no discussion, no hidden fees.

fast_processing.title: Fast Processing
fast_processing.description: Our warranty process is designed to be simple and efficient — no complicated procedures and no long waiting times.

direct_exchange.title: Direct Exchange
direct_exchange.description: Simply send us the defective product and receive a replacement quickly. Service can be that straightforward.

feature1.title: Be the hero of your own game!
feature1.description: Change classic games with real characters from your family. From backgammon to Ludo, now it’s your turn to be on the game board.

feature2.title: Our classic games — this time with pieces that smile!
feature2.description: Have you ever thought about playing with your own face, your spouse’s, or your children’s instead of ordinary colored pieces? We turn your ideas into fantasy characters and place them on game pieces.

feature3.title: A lasting gift
feature3.description: Ideal for wedding anniversaries, children’s birthdays, and family gatherings that will never be forgotten.

feature4.title: A game is not just entertainment; it is a memory
feature4.description: At My Travel Games, we have taken classic games like Ludo, Tic-Tac-Toe, and Backgammon out of their rigid and repetitive form. By adding your personalized characters, every roll of the dice in Backgammon brings a smile to your loved ones’ faces.

form.rule: JPG, JPEG and PNG, Max 5 MB
form.warranty_description1: Your order will be carefully prepared and ready within 7 days. We use high-quality materials and permanent printing techniques, ensuring that the colors are applied directly onto the surface and will not fade, peel, or wash away over time.
form.warranty_description2: We are committed to delivering a product that is both durable and made to last, so you can enjoy it with confidence.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are?
whoWeAre.description: We are passionate about reimagining timeless board game classics. Our goal is to unite the world's most beautiful board games in a modern, mobile format – without losing their original charm.

services.desc1: We are passionate players who believe classic games bring people closer together.
services.desc2: Born from a love of adventure, we create games made to move with you.
services.desc3: We focus on simplicity, elegance, and smart details in every product we create.
services.desc4: Our mission is to turn ordinary trips into unforgettable memories through play.

waysToShop.title: Ways To Shop
waysToShop.description: Pick the perfect travel game for yourself or your business, with easy ordering and great deals.

for_individuals.title: For Individuals
for_individuals.description: Compact travel games for your next adventure.
for_individuals.feature3: Perfect for solo or group play

for_businesses.title: For Businesses
for_businesses.description: Bulk orders for hotels, airlines, events, and retailers.
